summary: GharSetu Iteration 10 - Map Search Page and Owner Profile Page Testing. All features working correctly. Map Search shows OpenStreetMap with property markers, category filters, city selector, and Map/List toggle. Owner Profile Page shows Instagram-style profile with stats, Reels/Listings tabs, and Follow/Message buttons.

critical_code_review_comments: Map Search Page uses Leaflet with OpenStreetMap tiles - good free alternative
Category-colored markers are well implemented with custom divIcon
Owner Profile Page has Instagram-style layout with proper responsive design
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Map Search Page (/map) and Owner Profile Page (/owner/:ownerId) fully implemented and working. Map uses Leaflet with OpenStreetMap, shows property markers with category colors. Owner Profile shows reels/listings in tabs with stats and follow/message buttons.
